title: StimulusPair
description: A single stimulus pair for a PoL-Probe experiment. Each pair contrasts two sentences that differ on exactly the philosophical distinction being tested (e.g., opaque vs. transparent context, causal vs. associative reading). pair_id, thread_id, and theoretical labels are required for traceability back to the theory under test.

thread_id.description: Which philosophical thread this pair belongs to

sentence_a.description: First sentence of the contrast pair

sentence_b.description: Second sentence of the contrast pair

label_a.description: Theoretical label for sentence_a under the theory being tested. E.g. 'opaque', 'causal_l3', 'grounded', 'rigid'

theoretical_distinction.description: Human-readable name of the philosophical distinction. E.g. 'Frege opaque vs transparent context', 'Pearl L3 vs L1', 'Fine grounding asymmetry'

frequency_matched.description: True ONLY if validate_set() has verified corpus frequency matching (V7). Never set manually.

token_lengths.description: Token lengths under the target tokenizer. Set during validation.

generation_grammar.description: Which grammar file produced this pair. For traceability.

notes.description: Optional: edge cases, construction decisions, ambiguities observed during generation.
